metadata.purpose: Immutable registry of timestamped predictions for experimental verification
metadata.philosophy: Once published, a prediction CANNOT be modified. Temporal priority is guaranteed by Unix timestamp.
metadata.v9_changelog: Honest reclassification: all 10 predictions marked POSTDICTION.
metadata.v10_changelog: 4-tier classification system: postdiction/prior_informed/semiblind/blind + data_state_at_construction. Reclassified 10 entries: 5 PST + 5 PRI + 0 SBL + 0 BLD. Added data_sources and per-entry honest_assessment.
metadata.v10_1_changelog: FIRST semiblind prediction: P-SBL-001 delta_CP = (3-phi)*pi = 248.75 deg. Structurally derived from Trinity identity, NOT targeting T2K/NOvA hint.
metadata.v10_2_changelog: SECOND semiblind prediction: P-SBL-002 w0 = -1/phi = -0.618. Golden fraction of vacuum pressure, NOT targeting DESI best-fit. Total: 5 PST + 5 PRI + 2 SBL + 0 BLD = 12.

prediction_types.postdiction: Target value precisely known before formula; formula fit to data
prediction_types.prior_informed: Only bounds/ranges known; formula uses priors but no precise target
prediction_types.semiblind: Partial knowledge; deliberately avoided best-fit numbers
prediction_types.blind: No measurement exists; only order-of-magnitude or unknown

consistency_rules: postdiction FORBIDDEN with data_state unknown or order_of_magnitude
blind FORBIDDEN with data_state measured_precisely or measured_roughly

predictions.description: Sum of three neutrino mass eigenstates from cosmological constraints
data_sources: DESI DR2 + Planck upper bound ~0.12 eV (95% CL)
Neutrino oscillation lower bound ~0.059 eV (normal ordering)
predictions.rationale: Extended sacred formula search beyond standard bounds. Value within Planck 2020 upper limit of 0.12 eV.
predictions.honest_assessment: Prior-informed: constructed inside the cosmological window (0.059-0.12 eV); no direct kinematic measurement at construction time.

predictions.description: Mass of the QCD axion solving the strong CP problem
data_sources: Theoretical QCD axion window: 10^-6 to 10^-3 eV
predictions.rationale: Sacred formula fit within experimental window. ADMX: 1-100 μeV excluded, HAYSTAC ongoing.
predictions.honest_assessment: Prior-informed: constructed within theoretical axion window using ADMX exclusion bounds. No direct detection at construction time.

predictions.description: Upper bound on graviton mass from gravitational wave observations
predictions.rationale: Consistent with LIGO/Virgo constraints. GW dispersion tests continue to improve bounds.
predictions.honest_assessment: Prior-informed: constructed below LIGO upper bound. Only constraint is m_g < 1.27e-22 eV.

predictions.description: Proton decay lifetime via p → e+ π0 channel (GUT prediction)
predictions.rationale: Beyond current Super-K bound. Hyper-K and DUNE will improve sensitivity to >10^35 yr.
predictions.honest_assessment: Prior-informed: constructed above Super-K lower bound. No positive detection of proton decay.

predictions.description: Mass of hypothetical dark photon (U-boson) explaining Atomki anomaly
predictions.rationale: Exact 17.0 MeV from sacred formula matches Atomki anomaly. Status controversial but not excluded.
predictions.honest_assessment: Postdiction: Atomki 17 MeV observation (2016) was known before formula construction. Measurement controversial (~3σ) but exists.

predictions.description: Mass of thermally produced WIMP dark matter candidate
predictions.rationale: Sacred formula predicts ~100 GeV, near historical favored region. Direct detection ongoing.
predictions.honest_assessment: Prior-informed: only WIMP miracle order-of-magnitude range (10-1000 GeV) known. No direct detection.

predictions.description: Tensor-to-scalar ratio from primordial gravitational waves
predictions.rationale: r < 0.036 bound was known. Formula predicted 0.037, just above limit.
predictions.honest_assessment: Postdiction + FALSIFIED: BICEP/Keck bound was known before formula. Prediction exceeds r < 0.032 (2026 update).

predictions.description: Characteristic energy scale where QCD coupling becomes strong
data_sources: PDG 2024, QCD coupling and Lambda_QCD section
predictions.rationale: Remarkably simple formula 7*pi^3 yields central value of QCD confinement scale.
predictions.honest_assessment: Postdiction: Lambda_QCD ≈ 200-300 MeV and PDG 214±7 MeV were known before constructing 7π³.
predictions.notes: 7*pi^3 = 217.04 MeV vs PDG 214 +/- 7 MeV. Within 0.43 sigma. Beautiful formula but POSTDICTION.

predictions.description: Mixing angle governing nu_e <-> nu_mu oscillations
predictions.rationale: Governs solar neutrino oscillations. NuFIT 5.2: 33.44 +/- 0.76 degrees.
predictions.honest_assessment: Postdiction: NuFIT 33.44±0.76° was known before formula construction. Excellent fit (0.07σ) but not predictive.
predictions.notes: 33.391 deg vs NuFIT 33.44 deg. Within 0.07 sigma.

predictions.description: Mixing angle governing nu_mu <-> nu_tau oscillations
predictions.honest_assessment: Postdiction: NuFIT 49.2±1.0° was known before formula construction. Excellent fit (0.2σ) but not predictive.
predictions.notes: 49.002 deg vs NuFIT 49.2 deg. Within 0.2 sigma.

blind_predictions.description: CP-violating phase of the PMNS leptonic mixing matrix, governing matter-antimatter asymmetry in neutrino oscillations
data_sources: T2K+NOvA joint analysis (2025): weak hint at δ_CP ≈ -π/2 (≈27°), but full range [0, 2π] not excluded
NuFIT 5.3 (2024): no strong constraint on δ_CP
blind_predictions.formula_derivation: From Trinity identity φ² + 1/φ² = 3: the subdominant remainder (3 - φ) = 1 + 1/φ² represents the hidden contribution after removing the golden ratio from the Trinity whole. CP violation is the subdominant phase that breaks the dominant mixing structure. Projected onto the circle by π.

formula_params.note: V = (3 - phi) * pi, not standard n*3^k form

blind_predictions.uncertainty_method: 5% structural uncertainty (no experimental basis for tighter bounds)
blind_predictions.falsification_criterion: DUNE FD1+beam data (~2031): if δ_CP measured at 3σ and value excludes [236°, 261°] range
blind_predictions.rationale: Structural derivation from Trinity identity. The subdominant remainder (3 - φ) after removing the golden ratio from 3 = φ² + 1/φ², projected onto the circle. Formula chosen for structural beauty, NOT by targeting experimental hints.
blind_predictions.honest_assessment: SEMIBLIND: Full range [0, 2π] not excluded at construction time. T2K/NOvA hint (~270°) was known but deliberately NOT used as target. Formula derived from structural/aesthetic arguments only. Value 248.75° is ~21° away from the experimental hint, confirming non-targeting. sin(δ_CP) < 0 predicts normal mass ordering with matter-favoring oscillations.
blind_predictions.notes: FIRST SEMIBLIND PREDICTION in Trinity registry. Alternative candidate: φ² + 1 = 3.618 rad = 207.3° (pure golden ratio, no π). Reserved as backup if DUNE shows II quadrant preference.

construction_protocol.step_1: Generated 7 candidate formulas from structural/aesthetic arguments ONLY
construction_protocol.step_2: Evaluated all candidates BEFORE comparing to experimental hints
construction_protocol.step_3: Selected (3-φ)π for: Trinity identity connection, low complexity (2.0), good falsifiability (~21° from hint)
construction_protocol.step_4: Recorded formula and value before any further experimental data analysis
construction_protocol.forbidden: Brute-force search, numerical fitting, targeting 270° T2K/NOvA hint

blind_predictions.constant_name: Dark energy equation of state w₀
blind_predictions.description: Present-day dark energy equation of state parameter in CPL parametrization w(a) = w0 + wa(1-a)
data_sources: DESI DR2 + Planck CMB (Mar 2025): w0 = -0.42 ± 0.21 in w0-wa model
DESI DR2 BAO-only + CMB: 2.5-3.9σ tension with ΛCDM (w0=-1, wa=0)
blind_predictions.formula_derivation: The golden ratio φ is the unique positive number where 1/φ = φ - 1. If nature chooses the 'golden fraction' of perfect negative pressure (w = -1), then w0 = -1/φ. This is the simplest possible golden ratio expression for an equation of state. Additionally, 1 + w0 = 1/φ² means the deviation from ΛCDM is itself a golden power. The Trinity identity φ² + 1/φ² = 3 guarantees that -1/φ and -1/φ² sum to -1 (ΛCDM), creating an attractor pair.
blind_predictions.uncertainty_method: 5% structural uncertainty (no experimental basis for tighter bounds)
blind_predictions.falsification_criterion: DESI DR3 (2027): if w0 measured with σ(w0) < 0.1 and value excludes [-0.649, -0.587] at ≥3σ
blind_predictions.rationale: Structural derivation: dark energy as golden fraction of pure vacuum pressure. -1/phi is the simplest non-trivial sacred formula for an equation of state. Predicts quintessence (w0 > -1), not phantom energy.
blind_predictions.honest_assessment: SEMIBLIND: DESI DR2 gives w0 = -0.42 ± 0.21 (measured_roughly). Formula -1/φ = -0.618 was NOT derived by targeting -0.42. Structural motivation only: golden fraction of Λ. Value is ~0.8σ from DESI best-fit. Sacred geometry a priori favors quintessence over phantom.
blind_predictions.notes: SECOND SEMIBLIND PREDICTION. Alternative: -1/φ² = -0.382 (deviation from Λ = 1/φ, also golden). Attractor pair property: -1/φ + (-1/φ²) = -1 = ΛCDM.

construction_protocol.step_1: Generated 7 candidate formulas from structural/aesthetic arguments ONLY
construction_protocol.step_2: Evaluated all candidates BEFORE comparing to DESI best-fit
construction_protocol.step_3: Selected -1/phi for: minimal complexity (1.0), strongest structural argument (golden fraction of Lambda), good falsifiability (0.17 from DESI best-fit)
construction_protocol.step_4: Recorded formula and value before any further experimental data analysis
construction_protocol.forbidden: Brute-force search, numerical fitting, targeting DESI DR2 best-fit -0.45

honest_assessment.conclusion: v10.2 HONEST 4-TIER: 5 PST + 5 PRI + 2 SBL + 0 BLD = 12 total. Two semiblind predictions: delta_CP = (3-phi)*pi = 248.75 deg (DUNE ~2031), w0 = -1/phi = -0.618 (DESI DR3 ~2027).
